title: Uttar
overview: Uttar is a heartfelt Marathi film that captures today's fast-changing world and the timeless bond between a mother and her son. Uma Bhalerao, a warm radio presenter from Pune, has raised her son, Ninad, single-handedly after her husband's passing. Now a young engineer chasing an ambitious dream, Ninad has grown distant until one day his project unexpectedly brings them closer. What begins as a technical experiment turns into a touching journey of love, understanding and rediscovery. Uttar is a soul-stirring experience that reminds us that no matter how modern life becomes, a mother's heart always knows the way home. A must-watch with your family.
